stemHtml: A twin piston engine aircraft is loaded in such a way that during flight, as fuel is consumed, the CG moves to the neutral point. Which of these is true if the engine fails at this point?

options.a: The CG is on neutral point, so there will not be any yawing moment.
options.b: The yawing moment about the CG alters depending on the linear position of CG.
options.c: The yawing moment about the CG remains constant regardless of linear position of CG.
options.d: As the CG is on the neutral point, the yawing moment will be greater than rudder’s ability to control it.
